mapper.select:
SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, R.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, R.DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, R.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, R.CHECKOUT_DATE AS checkoutDate, R.NIGHT_CNT AS nightCnt, R.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, R.ROOM_ID AS roomId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, H.NAME AS hospitalName, H.ADDR AS hospitalAddr, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, T.TYPE_NAME AS treatTypeName, CASE WHEN RV.REVIEW_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS reviewedYn, S.NAME AS stayName, S.ADDR AS stayAddr, SR.NAME AS roomName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL H ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND H.HOSPITAL_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = R.DOCTOR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE T ON T.TREAT_TYPE_ID = R.TREAT_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_REVIEW RV ON RV.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID AND RV.REVIEW_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' LEFT JOIN TB_STAY S ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND S.STAY_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_STAY_ROOM SR ON SR.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID WHERE R.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'DONE'
AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('CANCEL', 'REJECTED')
ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC, R.RESV_ID DESC

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, R.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, R.DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, R.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, R.CHECKOUT_DATE AS checkoutDate, R.NIGHT_CNT AS nightCnt, R.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, R.ROOM_ID AS roomId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, COALESCE(H.NAME, S.NAME) AS hospitalName, COALESCE(H.ADDR, S.ADDR) AS hospitalAddr, D.DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, T.TYPE_NAME AS treatTypeName, CASE WHEN RV.REVIEW_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS reviewedYn, SR.NAME AS roomName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL H ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND H.HOSPITAL_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR D ON D.DOCTOR_ID = R.DOCTOR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE T ON T.TREAT_TYPE_ID = R.TREAT_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_REVIEW RV ON RV.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID AND RV.REVIEW_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' LEFT JOIN TB_STAY S ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND S.STAY_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_STAY_ROOM SR ON SR.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID WHERE R.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND R.RESV_ID = #{resvId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(REVIEW_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REVIEW
INSERT INTO TB_REVIEW ( REVIEW_ID, REVIEW_TYPE, TARGET_ID, MEMBER_NO, RESV_ID, RATING, CONTENT, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{reviewId}, 'HOSPITAL', #{targetId}, #{memberNo}, #{resvId}, #{rating}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
SELECT NICKNAME FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
